js_attribution_note: JS/TS attribution is a real AST parse (oxc): effects, time/random reads, and unsafe constructs are attributed by real scope containment, not a line heuristic. Only top-level named functions are tracked as flow candidates — effects inside class methods, object-literal methods, or nested functions/callbacks roll up to the enclosing top-level function (or are not tracked, for methods). Python attribution is the same real containment, over Python's own AST.
